ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data field */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the field is required or not */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the field */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the field */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* Allowed values for the field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the field */,
  "nullable" INTEGER /* Whether the field is nullable or not */,
  "unique" INTEGER /* Whether the field is unique or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugins" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the plugin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plugin */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name of the plugin */,
  "plugin_type" TEXT /* Type of the plugin (e.g., data generation, output) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plugin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plugin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_fields" (
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plugin_id", "field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeline_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "update_percentage" REAL /* Percentage chance of updating the field */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeline_simulations_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plugin_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plugin instance */,
  "plugin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plugin */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration for the plugin instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_instances_plugin_id FOREIGN KEY ("plugin_id") REFERENCES plugins ("plugin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plugin_instances_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data field */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation for the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_annotations_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES data_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
